news.t: Tortoise Capital Announces ETF Name Updates to Modernize Product Lineup

holdings.infoBox: TBLU is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Veolia Environnement stock at 8.34%, Ferguson Enterprises at 7.85%, Ecolab at 7.53%, American Water Works Company at 7.29%, and Xylem at 6.98%.

overview.description: The Tortoise Global Water ETF (TBLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Tortoise Global Water ESG index. The fund tracks an index of water infrastructure and management companies listed in developed countries. TBLU was launched on Feb 14, 2017 and is issued by Tortoise.
